privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated files created by the setup scripts. The agent is expected to configure a geofence with an inclusion polygon containing at least 5 vertices, define an exclusion zone, and set at least 2 rally points. The agent must save the plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_fence.plan. Furthermore, the agent must set specific ArduPilot parameters (FENCE_ACTION=1, RTL_ALT=2500), which correspond to the requirements in the dynamically generated ops_brief.txt.
